chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Revision Application No.271 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 20.10.2025 None is present for the applicant. No intimation has been received. This has been the case for the last two dates of hearing, i.e., 03.03.2025 and 25.09.2025. Accordingly, an intimation notice was issued and as per the report of service available on record, the notice was duly served upon the applicant. It appears that the applicant is not interested in prosecuting this Revision Application, same is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
